name: cohere-data-handling
description: Implement data privacy for Cohere API calls with PII redaction and compliance. Use when handling sensitive data, implementing PII redaction before API calls, or ensuring GDPR/CCPA compliance with Cohere integrations. Trigger with phrases like "cohere data", "cohere PII", "cohere GDPR", "cohere data retention", "cohere privacy", "cohere redact".
